---
title: "`omni-scrna` monitor"
format:
  html:
    df-print: kable   # or "paged", "gt", "table"
editor: source
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
ORG <- "omni-scrna"
WINDOW_HOURS <- 48
NUM_LATEST <- 2 # limit: number of commits per author/repo

# helper functions
.datemod <- function(u) as.POSIXct(u, format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", 
                                   tz = "UTC") 
.datechr <- function(u) .datemod(u) %>% 
  format("%d.%m.%Y (%H:%M)", tz = "Europe/Zurich")
.null2na <- function(u) ifelse(is.null(u), NA, u)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(dplyr)
library(gh)

# if local, get token from file; o/w from ENV on GA
.token <- ifelse(Sys.getenv("GITHUB_ACTIONS") == "true",
                 Sys.getenv("GITHUB_TOKEN"),
                 read.table("~/.credentials",sep="=")$V2)

stopifnot(nzchar(.token))

repos <- gh(paste0("/orgs/", ORG, "/repos"),
            .token = .token,
            .limit = 1000)
repos <- sapply(repos, .subset2, "html_url")

# data.frame(repos = repos)
```

Updated: `r .datechr(Sys.time())` <br>

## Quick summary

In this [`r ORG`](`r dirname(repos)[1]`) organization, you have [`r length(repos)` repositories](`r paste0("https://github.com/orgs/", ORG, "/repositories")`):<br>`r paste0("[", basename(repos), "](", repos, ") ")`. 

## List of open PRs

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

# getting list of open PRs
open_prs <- c()
for(i in 1:length(repos)) {
  prs <- gh("GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls",
            owner = "omni-scrna", 
            repo = basename(repos[i]),
            state = "open", per_page = 100,
            .token = .token)
  open_prs <- c(open_prs, prs)
}

# basic setup for kable
parse_pr_info <- function(u) {
  data.frame(repo = paste0("[", basename(u$base$repo$url), "](",
                           u$base$repo$svn_url, ")"),
             sender = u$user$login,
             title = u$title,
             pr = paste0("[", basename(u$html_url), "](", u$html_url, ")",
                         ifelse(u$draft, " [DRAFT]","")),
             last_update = .datechr(u$updated_at))
}

prs_df <- lapply(open_prs, parse_pr_info) %>% 
  bind_rows() %>%
  arrange(last_update)

prs_df

```


## Active branches (last `r WINDOW_HOURS` hours)

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

cmts_df <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:length(repos)) {
  branches <- gh("/repos/:owner/:repo/branches", owner = ORG, 
                 repo = basename(repos[i]), .token = .token)
  for(j in 1:length(branches)) {
    ctr <- gh("/repos/:owner/:repo/commits?sha=:sha",
              owner = ORG, repo = basename(repos[i]), per_page = NUM_LATEST,
              sha = branches[[j]]$name, .token = .token)
    commits_df <- data.frame(author = sapply(ctr, 
                                             function(u) .null2na(u$committer$login)),
                             repo = paste0("[", basename(repos[i]), "](", repos[i], ")"),
                             branch = paste0("[", branches[[j]]$name, "](",
                                             repos[i],"/tree/", branches[[j]]$name, ")"),
                             message = sapply(ctr, 
                                            function(u) paste0("[", 
                                                               substr(gsub("\n", " ", 
                                                                           u$commit$message), 1, 40),
                                                               "](", u$html_url, ")")),
                             date = sapply(ctr, function(u) .datemod(u$commit$author$date))
                             ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(author), date >= as.POSIXct(Sys.time()-WINDOW_HOURS*60*60, 
                                              tz="Europe/Zurich")) %>%
    mutate(date = .datechr(date))
  cmts_df <- rbind(cmts_df, commits_df)
    
  }
}


cmts_df %>% 
  arrange(desc(date)) %>%
  group_by(author, repo) %>% 
  slice_head(n = NUM_LATEST) %>%
  ungroup %>%
  arrange(desc(date))


```


## Last commit (to `main`) for each repo

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

df_list <- list()
for(i in 1:length(repos)) {
  ctr <- gh("GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/commits",
            owner = ORG, repo = basename(repos[i]),
            sha = "main", .token = .token, per_page = 1)[[1]]
  hsh <- ctr$sha
  df_list[[i]] <- data.frame(author = ctr$committer$login,
                             repo = paste0("[", basename(repos[i]), "](", repos[i], ")"),
                             date = .datemod(ctr$commit$author$date),
                             hash = paste0(substr(hsh, 1, 7)))
} 

bind_rows(df_list) %>%
  mutate(date = .datechr(date))

```



<!-- ```{r projects} -->

<!-- query <- ' -->
<!-- query($login: String!, $number: Int!, $n: Int!) { -->
<!--   organization(login: $login) @include(if: false) { -->
<!--     projectV2(number: $number) { id } -->
<!--   } -->

<!--   org: organization(login: $login) { -->
<!--     projectV2(number: $number) { -->
<!--       id -->
<!--       title -->
<!--       items(first: $n) { -->
<!--         nodes { -->
<!--           id -->
<!--           updatedAt -->
<!--           type -->
<!--           fieldValueByName(name: "Status") { -->
<!--             __typename -->
<!--             ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldSingleSelectValue { -->
<!--               name -->
<!--             } -->
<!--           } -->
<!--           content { -->
<!--             __typename -->
<!--             ... on DraftIssue { -->
<!--               title -->
<!--               body -->
<!--             } -->
<!--             ... on Issue { -->
<!--               title -->
<!--               number -->
<!--               state -->
<!--               url -->
<!--             } -->
<!--             ... on PullRequest { -->
<!--               title -->
<!--               number -->
<!--               state -->
<!--               url -->
<!--             } -->
<!--           } -->
<!--         } -->
<!--       } -->
<!--     } -->
<!--   } -->

<!--   usr: user(login: $login) { -->
<!--     projectV2(number: $number) { -->
<!--       id -->
<!--       title -->
<!--       items(first: $n) { -->
<!--         nodes { -->
<!--           id -->
<!--           updatedAt -->
<!--           type -->
<!--           fieldValueByName(name: "Status") { -->
<!--             __typename -->
<!--             ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldSingleSelectValue { -->
<!--               name -->
<!--             } -->
<!--           } -->
<!--           content { -->
<!--             __typename -->
<!--             ... on DraftIssue { -->
<!--               title -->
<!--               body -->
<!--             } -->
<!--             ... on Issue { -->
<!--               title -->
<!--               number -->
<!--               state -->
<!--               url -->
<!--             } -->
<!--             ... on PullRequest { -->
<!--               title -->
<!--               number -->
<!--               state -->
<!--               url -->
<!--             } -->
<!--           } -->
<!--         } -->
<!--       } -->
<!--     } -->
<!--   } -->
<!-- } -->
<!-- ' -->

<!-- res <- gh_gql( -->
<!--   query, -->
<!--   login = "omni-scrna", -->
<!--   number = 1L, -->
<!--   n = 20L -->
<!-- ) -->




<!-- library(ghql) -->
<!-- library(jsonlite) -->

<!-- # Create the client -->
<!-- cli <- GraphqlClient$new( -->
<!--   url = "https://api.github.com/graphql", -->
<!--   headers = list(Authorization = paste0("Bearer ", .token)) -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- # Define your query -->
<!-- qry <- Query$new() -->
<!-- qry$query('myProjects', '{ -->
<!--   viewer { -->
<!--     projectsV2(first: 10) { -->
<!--       items { -->
<!--         title -->
<!--         id -->
<!--         url -->
<!--       } -->
<!--     } -->
<!--   } -->
<!-- }') -->

<!-- # Execute -->
<!-- result <- cli$exec(qry$queries$myProjects) -->
<!-- result <- fromJSON(result, flatten = TRUE) -->





<!-- #!/usr/bin/env Rscript -->

<!-- # GitHub Projects V2 example with R + ghql -->
<!-- # Requires: GITHUB_TOKEN in your environment -->

<!-- suppressPackageStartupMessages({ -->
<!--   library(ghql) -->
<!--   library(jsonlite) -->
<!--   library(dplyr) -->
<!--   library(tidyr) -->
<!--   library(purrr) -->
<!--   library(tibble) -->
<!--   library(stringr) -->
<!-- }) -->

<!-- token <- Sys.getenv("GITHUB_TOKEN") -->
<!-- if (identical(token, "")) { -->
<!--   stop("Set GITHUB_TOKEN before running, e.g. Sys.setenv(GITHUB_TOKEN = 'ghp_...')") -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- # ---- user parameters --------------------------------------------------------- -->
<!-- owner_login <- "markrobinsonuzh"     # e.g. "your-user" or "your-org" -->
<!-- owner_type  <- "omni-scrna"         # "organization" or "user" -->
<!-- project_num <- 1L                     # Project V2 number shown in the URL -->
<!-- items_first <- 50L                    # page size per request -->
<!-- # ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ -->

<!-- con <- GraphqlClient$new( -->
<!--   url = "https://api.github.com/graphql", -->
<!--   headers = list(Authorization = paste0("Bearer ", .token)) -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- qry <- Query$new() -->

<!-- qry$query( -->
<!--   "project_items", -->
<!--   ' -->
<!-- query ProjectItems($login: String!, $number: Int!, $itemsFirst: Int!, $itemsAfter: String) { -->
<!--   rateLimit { -->
<!--     limit -->
<!--     cost -->
<!--     remaining -->
<!--     resetAt -->
<!--   } -->

<!--   organization(login: $login) @include(if: false) { -->
<!--     __typename -->
<!--   } -->

<!--   user(login: $login) @include(if: false) { -->
<!--     __typename -->
<!--   } -->

<!--   owner: repositoryOwner(login: $login) { -->
<!--     __typename -->
<!--     login -->
<!--     ... on Organization { -->
<!--       projectV2(number: $number) { -->
<!--         id -->
<!--         title -->
<!--         url -->
<!--         closed -->
<!--         fields(first: 50) { -->
<!--           nodes { -->
<!--             __typename -->
<!--             ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { -->
<!--               id -->
<!--               name -->
<!--             } -->
<!--             ... on ProjectV2IterationField { -->
<!--               id -->
<!--               name -->
<!--               configuration { -->
<!--                 iterations { -->
<!--                   id -->
<!--                   title -->
<!--                   startDate -->
<!--                   duration -->
<!--                 } -->
<!--               } -->
<!--             } -->
<!--             ... on ProjectV2SingleSelectField { -->
<!--               id -->
<!--               name -->
<!--               options { -->
<!--                 id -->
<!--                 name -->
<!--               } -->
<!--             } -->
<!--           } -->
<!--         } -->
<!--         items(first: $itemsFirst, after: $itemsAfter) { -->
<!--           pageInfo { -->
<!--             hasNextPage -->
<!--             endCursor -->
<!--           } -->
<!--           nodes { -->
<!--             id -->
<!--             type -->
<!--             isArchived -->
<!--             createdAt -->
<!--             updatedAt -->

<!--             content { -->
<!--               __typename -->
<!--               ... on Issue { -->
<!--                 id -->
<!--                 number -->
<!--                 title -->
<!--                 url -->
<!--                 state -->
<!--                 repository { nameWithOwner } -->
<!--                 assignees(first: 20) { nodes { login } } -->
<!--                 labels(first: 20) { nodes { name } } -->
<!--               } -->
<!--               ... on PullRequest { -->
<!--                 id -->
<!--                 number -->
<!--                 title -->
<!--                 url -->
<!--                 state -->
<!--                 repository { nameWithOwner } -->
<!--                 assignees(first: 20) { nodes { login } } -->
<!--                 labels(first: 20) { nodes { name } } -->
<!--               } -->
<!--               ... on DraftIssue { -->
<!--                 id -->
<!--                 title -->
<!--                 body -->
<!--               } -->
<!--             } -->

<!--             fieldValues(first: 50) { -->
<!--               nodes { -->
<!--                 __typename -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldTextValue { -->
<!--                   text -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldNumberValue { -->
<!--                   number -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldDateValue { -->
<!--                   date -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldSingleSelectValue { -->
<!--                   name -->
<!--                   optionId -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldIterationValue { -->
<!--                   title -->
<!--                   iterationId -->
<!--                   startDate -->
<!--                   duration -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldMilestoneValue { -->
<!--                   milestone { -->
<!--                     id -->
<!--                     title -->
<!--                     dueOn -->
<!--                   } -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldRepositoryValue { -->
<!--                   repository { -->
<!--                     id -->
<!--                     nameWithOwner -->
<!--                     url -->
<!--                   } -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldReviewerValue { -->
<!--                   reviewers(first: 20) { -->
<!--                     nodes { -->
<!--                       __typename -->
<!--                       ... on User { login } -->
<!--                       ... on Team { slug name } -->
<!--                     } -->
<!--                   } -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldUserValue { -->
<!--                   users(first: 20) { -->
<!--                     nodes { login } -->
<!--                   } -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldLabelValue { -->
<!--                   labels(first: 20) { -->
<!--                     nodes { name } -->
<!--                   } -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldPullRequestValue { -->
<!--                   pullRequests(first: 20) { -->
<!--                     nodes { -->
<!--                       number -->
<!--                       title -->
<!--                       url -->
<!--                     } -->
<!--                   } -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldIssueValue { -->
<!--                   issues(first: 20) { -->
<!--                     nodes { -->
<!--                       number -->
<!--                       title -->
<!--                       url -->
<!--                     } -->
<!--                   } -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->
<!--               } -->
<!--             } -->
<!--           } -->
<!--         } -->
<!--       } -->
<!--     } -->

<!--     ... on User { -->
<!--       projectV2(number: $number) { -->
<!--         id -->
<!--         title -->
<!--         url -->
<!--         closed -->
<!--         fields(first: 50) { -->
<!--           nodes { -->
<!--             __typename -->
<!--             ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { -->
<!--               id -->
<!--               name -->
<!--             } -->
<!--             ... on ProjectV2IterationField { -->
<!--               id -->
<!--               name -->
<!--               configuration { -->
<!--                 iterations { -->
<!--                   id -->
<!--                   title -->
<!--                   startDate -->
<!--                   duration -->
<!--                 } -->
<!--               } -->
<!--             } -->
<!--             ... on ProjectV2SingleSelectField { -->
<!--               id -->
<!--               name -->
<!--               options { -->
<!--                 id -->
<!--                 name -->
<!--               } -->
<!--             } -->
<!--           } -->
<!--         } -->
<!--         items(first: $itemsFirst, after: $itemsAfter) { -->
<!--           pageInfo { -->
<!--             hasNextPage -->
<!--             endCursor -->
<!--           } -->
<!--           nodes { -->
<!--             id -->
<!--             type -->
<!--             isArchived -->
<!--             createdAt -->
<!--             updatedAt -->

<!--             content { -->
<!--               __typename -->
<!--               ... on Issue { -->
<!--                 id -->
<!--                 number -->
<!--                 title -->
<!--                 url -->
<!--                 state -->
<!--                 repository { nameWithOwner } -->
<!--                 assignees(first: 20) { nodes { login } } -->
<!--                 labels(first: 20) { nodes { name } } -->
<!--               } -->
<!--               ... on PullRequest { -->
<!--                 id -->
<!--                 number -->
<!--                 title -->
<!--                 url -->
<!--                 state -->
<!--                 repository { nameWithOwner } -->
<!--                 assignees(first: 20) { nodes { login } } -->
<!--                 labels(first: 20) { nodes { name } } -->
<!--               } -->
<!--               ... on DraftIssue { -->
<!--                 id -->
<!--                 title -->
<!--                 body -->
<!--               } -->
<!--             } -->

<!--             fieldValues(first: 50) { -->
<!--               nodes { -->
<!--                 __typename -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldTextValue { -->
<!--                   text -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldNumberValue { -->
<!--                   number -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldDateValue { -->
<!--                   date -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldSingleSelectValue { -->
<!--                   name -->
<!--                   optionId -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldIterationValue { -->
<!--                   title -->
<!--                   iterationId -->
<!--                   startDate -->
<!--                   duration -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldMilestoneValue { -->
<!--                   milestone { -->
<!--                     id -->
<!--                     title -->
<!--                     dueOn -->
<!--                   } -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldRepositoryValue { -->
<!--                   repository { -->
<!--                     id -->
<!--                     nameWithOwner -->
<!--                     url -->
<!--                   } -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldReviewerValue { -->
<!--                   reviewers(first: 20) { -->
<!--                     nodes { -->
<!--                       __typename -->
<!--                       ... on User { login } -->
<!--                       ... on Team { slug name } -->
<!--                     } -->
<!--                   } -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldUserValue { -->
<!--                   users(first: 20) { -->
<!--                     nodes { login } -->
<!--                   } -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldLabelValue { -->
<!--                   labels(first: 20) { -->
<!--                     nodes { name } -->
<!--                   } -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldPullRequestValue { -->
<!--                   pullRequests(first: 20) { -->
<!--                     nodes { -->
<!--                       number -->
<!--                       title -->
<!--                       url -->
<!--                     } -->
<!--                   } -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->

<!--                 ... on ProjectV2ItemFieldIssueValue { -->
<!--                   issues(first: 20) { -->
<!--                     nodes { -->
<!--                       number -->
<!--                       title -->
<!--                       url -->
<!--                     } -->
<!--                   } -->
<!--                   field { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } -->
<!--                 } -->
<!--               } -->
<!--             } -->
<!--           } -->
<!--         } -->
<!--       } -->
<!--     } -->
<!--   } -->
<!-- } -->
<!-- ' -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- exec_query <- function(after = NULL) { -->
<!--   variables <- list( -->
<!--     login = owner_login, -->
<!--     number = as.integer(project_num), -->
<!--     itemsFirst = as.integer(items_first), -->
<!--     itemsAfter = after -->
<!--   ) -->
<!--   res <- con$exec(qry$queries$project_items, variables = variables) -->
<!--   jsonlite::fromJSON(res, simplifyVector = FALSE) -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- project_from_response <- function(x) { -->
<!--   owner <- x$data$owner -->
<!--   if (is.null(owner)) stop("Owner not found. Check login/token scopes.") -->
<!--   owner$projectV2 -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- flatten_field_value <- function(fv) { -->
<!--   typename <- fv$`__typename` -->
<!--   field_name <- purrr::pluck(fv, "field", "name", .default = NA_character_) -->

<!--   value <- switch( -->
<!--     typename, -->
<!--     ProjectV2ItemFieldTextValue = fv$text %||% NA_character_, -->
<!--     ProjectV2ItemFieldNumberValue = if (!is.null(fv$number)) as.character(fv$number) else NA_character_, -->
<!--     ProjectV2ItemFieldDateValue = fv$date %||% NA_character_, -->
<!--     ProjectV2ItemFieldSingleSelectValue = fv$name %||% NA_character_, -->
<!--     ProjectV2ItemFieldIterationValue = fv$title %||% NA_character_, -->
<!--     ProjectV2ItemFieldMilestoneValue = purrr::pluck(fv, "milestone", "title", .default = NA_character_), -->
<!--     ProjectV2ItemFieldRepositoryValue = purrr::pluck(fv, "repository", "nameWithOwner", .default = NA_character_), -->
<!--     ProjectV2ItemFieldReviewerValue = { -->
<!--       nodes <- purrr::pluck(fv, "reviewers", "nodes", .default = list()) -->
<!--       vals <- purrr::map_chr(nodes, function(n) { -->
<!--         if (identical(n$`__typename`, "User")) n$login else paste0("team:", n$slug %||% n$name) -->
<!--       }) -->
<!--       paste(vals, collapse = "; ") -->
<!--     }, -->
<!--     ProjectV2ItemFieldUserValue = { -->
<!--       nodes <- purrr::pluck(fv, "users", "nodes", .default = list()) -->
<!--       paste(purrr::map_chr(nodes, "login"), collapse = "; ") -->
<!--     }, -->
<!--     ProjectV2ItemFieldLabelValue = { -->
<!--       nodes <- purrr::pluck(fv, "labels", "nodes", .default = list()) -->
<!--       paste(purrr::map_chr(nodes, "name"), collapse = "; ") -->
<!--     }, -->
<!--     ProjectV2ItemFieldPullRequestValue = { -->
<!--       nodes <- purrr::pluck(fv, "pullRequests", "nodes", .default = list()) -->
<!--       paste(purrr::map_chr(nodes, ~ paste0("#", .x$number, " ", .x$title)), collapse = "; ") -->
<!--     }, -->
<!--     ProjectV2ItemFieldIssueValue = { -->
<!--       nodes <- purrr::pluck(fv, "issues", "nodes", .default = list()) -->
<!--       paste(purrr::map_chr(nodes, ~ paste0("#", .x$number, " ", .x$title)), collapse = "; ") -->
<!--     }, -->
<!--     NA_character_ -->
<!--   ) -->

<!--   tibble( -->
<!--     field_name = field_name, -->
<!--     field_type = typename, -->
<!--     field_value = value -->
<!--   ) -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- `%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) y else x -->

<!-- flatten_item <- function(item) { -->
<!--   content <- item$content -->
<!--   content_type <- content$`__typename` %||% NA_character_ -->

<!--   base <- tibble( -->
<!--     item_id = item$id %||% NA_character_, -->
<!--     item_type = item$type %||% NA_character_, -->
<!--     archived = item$isArchived %||% FALSE, -->
<!--     created_at = item$createdAt %||% NA_character_, -->
<!--     updated_at = item$updatedAt %||% NA_character_, -->
<!--     content_type = content_type, -->
<!--     content_id = content$id %||% NA_character_, -->
<!--     content_number = if (!is.null(content$number)) as.integer(content$number) else NA_integer_, -->
<!--     title = content$title %||% NA_character_, -->
<!--     url = content$url %||% NA_character_, -->
<!--     state = content$state %||% NA_character_, -->
<!--     repository = purrr::pluck(content, "repository", "nameWithOwner", .default = NA_character_), -->
<!--     assignees = paste(purrr::map_chr(purrr::pluck(content, "assignees", "nodes", .default = list()), "login"), collapse = "; "), -->
<!--     labels = paste(purrr::map_chr(purrr::pluck(content, "labels", "nodes", .default = list()), "name"), collapse = "; ") -->
<!--   ) -->

<!--   field_values <- purrr::pluck(item, "fieldValues", "nodes", .default = list()) -->
<!--   if (length(field_values) == 0) return(base) -->

<!--   fv_long <- purrr::map_dfr(field_values, flatten_field_value) %>% -->
<!--     filter(!is.na(field_name), field_name != "") -->

<!--   if (nrow(fv_long) == 0) return(base) -->

<!--   fv_wide <- fv_long %>% -->
<!--     group_by(field_name) %>% -->
<!--     summarise(field_value = paste(unique(na.omit(field_value)), collapse = " | "), .groups = "drop") %>% -->
<!--     tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = field_name, values_from = field_value) -->

<!--   bind_cols(base, fv_wide) -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- all_items <- list() -->
<!-- after <- NULL -->
<!-- page <- 1L -->
<!-- project_meta <- NULL -->
<!-- rate_limit <- NULL -->

<!-- repeat { -->
<!--   res <- exec_query(after) -->
<!--   if (!is.null(res$errors)) { -->
<!--     stop(toJSON(res$errors, auto_unbox = TRUE, pretty = TRUE)) -->
<!--   } -->

<!--   rate_limit <- res$data$rateLimit -->
<!--   project <- project_from_response(res) -->
<!--   if (is.null(project)) stop("Project not found. Check project number and whether the token can see it.") -->

<!--   if (is.null(project_meta)) { -->
<!--     project_meta <- tibble( -->
<!--       owner_login = owner_login, -->
<!--       owner_kind = res$data$owner$`__typename` %||% NA_character_, -->
<!--       project_id = project$id %||% NA_character_, -->
<!--       project_title = project$title %||% NA_character_, -->
<!--       project_url = project$url %||% NA_character_, -->
<!--       project_closed = project$closed %||% FALSE -->
<!--     ) -->
<!--   } -->

<!--   nodes <- purrr::pluck(project, "items", "nodes", .default = list()) -->
<!--   all_items[[page]] <- purrr::map_dfr(nodes, flatten_item) -->

<!--   page_info <- project$items$pageInfo -->
<!--   if (isFALSE(page_info$hasNextPage)) break -->

<!--   after <- page_info$endCursor -->
<!--   page <- page + 1L -->
<!-- } -->

<!-- items_tbl <- bind_rows(all_items) %>% -->
<!--   mutate( -->
<!--     owner_login = owner_login, -->
<!--     project_number = project_num -->
<!--   ) %>% -->
<!--   relocate(owner_login, project_number, everything()) -->

<!-- cat("\nProject metadata:\n") -->
<!-- print(project_meta) -->

<!-- cat("\nItems preview:\n") -->
<!-- print(utils::head(items_tbl, 10)) -->

<!-- cat("\nRate limit:\n") -->
<!-- print(as_tibble(rate_limit)) -->

<!-- # Optional write-out -->
<!-- # readr::write_csv(items_tbl, "github_project_items.csv") -->

<!-- ``` -->
